# Maging — AI Output Formatter

> **AI 답변을, 쓸 수 있는 결과물로.** (AI answers, into usable artifacts.)
> 코딩 없이, 디자인 없이 — 대시보드·피치덱을 HTML로 바로 생성합니다.
>
> maging is the missing "last mile" between LLM analysis and shareable visual artifacts. Library of 31 widgets and 35 brand themes that LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok) can reliably produce as a single self-contained HTML file. Default behavior is **curated static snapshots** (LLM acts as analyst, not interactive BI tool).

## Installation

**One-liner (recommended)** — auto-loads Pretendard + maging.css + Tailwind Play + ECharts + maging.js in correct order:

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/m1kapp/maging@v0.1.5/dist/maging-all.js"></script>
<body class="mw-themed">
```

The script dispatches a `'maging:ready'` event on `window` once all dependencies are loaded. Mount widgets inside that listener (or `DOMContentLoaded` — whichever fires later).

```js
window.addEventListener('maging:ready', () => {
  Maging.kpiCard('#el', { label: '매출', value: '₩128억', delta: 8.3 });
});
```

Skip a default with data-attributes:
```html
<script src=".../maging-all.js" data-no-tailwind data-no-echarts></script>
```

**Manual install** (granular control, custom version pinning):

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/m1kapp/maging@v0.1.5/dist/maging.css">
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/echarts@5/dist/echarts.min.js"></script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/m1kapp/maging@v0.1.5/dist/maging.js"></script>
```

Set the theme on `<html data-theme="…">`. Wrap body with `<body class="mw-themed">` for base styling.

**Pretendard Variable** is `@import`-ed inside `maging.css`, so Korean text renders consistently across platforms with no extra setup.

## Modes

| Mode | Status | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `dashboard` | ✅ Available | Grid-based dashboard with 31 widgets |
| `deck` | 🚧 Coming soon | Slide-based presentations with keyboard navigation |
| `doc` | 🚧 Coming soon | Long-scroll documents and reports |

Currently all widgets work in dashboard mode via CSS Grid layout.

## Themes (35)

Set on `<html data-theme="NAME">`. The value must match exactly.

**Light (18)**: `notion`, `vercel`, `linear`, `github`, `apple`, `stripe`, `linkedin`, `x`, `medium`, `tiffany`, `airbnb`, `youtube`, `reddit`, `duolingo`, `mailchimp`, `tmobile`, `fedex`, `claude`, `instagram`, `hermes`, `barbie`

**Dark (17)**: `openai`, `discord`, `figma`, `amazon`, `adobe`, `netflix`, `twitch`, `spotify`, `bloomberg`, `slack`, `nasa`, `heineken`, `deere`, `ups`

Each theme is inspired by the named brand's signature palette, radius, typography, and shadow style. Change the theme value to instantly re-style every widget.

## Widgets (31)

Mount via `window.Maging.<widgetName>(selector, config)`. All widgets auto-refresh on theme change.

### Metric tiles

- `kpiCard({ label, value, delta?, sparkline?, icon?, compact?, deltaGoodWhen? })` — label + value + delta + optional mini line chart. `compact: true` hides sparkline and uses smaller padding (for tight grids).
- `heroTile({ label, value, delta?, sparkline, icon?, context? })` — iOS-weather-widget-style main metric tile.
- `ringProgress({ value, max, unit, label, context?, thresholds })` — donut progress ring with threshold colors.
- `compareCard({ title, left:{label,value}, right:{label,value}, delta, deltaLabel? })` — A vs B side-by-side.
- `metricStack({ title, main:{label,value,delta}, items:[{label,value}] })` — hero metric + sub metrics (bento style).
- `countdownTile({ title, subtitle?, target, label?, context? })` — live countdown to an ISO datetime.

### Charts

- `lineChart({ title, categories, series:[{name,data}], stack?, area?, yFormatter?, yMin?, yMax? })`
- `barChart({ title, items:[{label,value}], horizontal?, yFormatter?, showLabels? })`
- `donutChart({ title, slices:[{label,value,color?}], centerLabel?, centerValue? })`
- `funnelChart({ title, stages:[{label,value}], valueSuffix? })`
- `gaugeChart({ title, label, value, max, unit, thresholds:[[ratio,level]] })`
- `radarChart({ indicators:[{name,max}], series:[{name,data}] })`
- `heatmapChart({ xAxis, yAxis, matrix:[[row]], tooltipFormatter? })`
- `treemapChart({ items:[{name,value}], valueFormatter? })`
- `scatterChart({ points:[{label,x,y,size}], xLabel?, yLabel? })`
- `sankeyChart({ nodes:[{name}], links:[{source,target,value}], valueFormatter? })`
- `waterfallChart({ items:[{label,value,type?}], valueFormatter? })` — type: 'start'|'gain'|'loss'|'total' (auto-detected if omitted)
- `bulletChart({ value, target?, benchmark?, max, min?, ranges?:[{value,label}], valueFormatter?, unit? })`

### Geographic

- `mapChart({ items:[{region,value}], valueFormatter?, tiles? })` — hex tile map of Korea's 17 provinces (서울, 경기, 부산, …). Provide items by region name.

### Lists

- `leaderboard({ title, items:[{name,initial,percent,meta}] })` — ranked list with avatars and progress bars.
- `activityTable({ title, columns:[{key,label,align?,render?}], rows:[...] , live? })` — `render: (value, row) => string` where `value` is the cell value at `col.key` (NOT the whole row). Prefer pre-formatting rows as plain strings to skip `render` entirely.
- `timeline({ title, items:[{time,text,type?}] })` — event stream with colored dots.
- `inboxPreview({ title, items:[{icon,text,time,type}], footer? })` — notification list.
- `statusGrid({ title, columns?, items:[{label,status,value?}] })` — service health dots (`status: 'ok'|'warning'|'danger'`).
- `sparklineList({ title, items:[{label,value,delta,sparkline,deltaGoodWhen?}] })` — label + value + delta + mini spark per row.
- `goalGrid({ title, items:[{label,value,max,unit?,sublabel?}], thresholds? })` — multi-goal progress bars (OKR style).

### Calendar

- `calendarHeatmap({ title, year, values:[[date,value]], max?, valueSuffix?, height?, cellSize? })` — GitHub-style 365-day heatmap.
- `eventCalendar({ title, year, month, events:[{date,label,type?}], startOfWeek?, showList?, listFilter? })`

### Project

- `progressStepper({ title, kicker?, status?, meta, steps:[{label,date,status,badge?}] })` — project milestone tracker.

### Cohort & retention

- `cohortMatrix({ cohorts:[], periods:[], data:[[v,…]], sizes?:[], cohortLabel?, sizeLabel?, valueFormatter? })` — Mixpanel-style retention grid. Null cells render blank.

### Control & messaging

- `alertBanner({ type, title, message?, icon?, action?:{label,href?,onClick?}, dismissable? })` — top-of-page stripe. Not a card. `type: 'info'|'warning'|'danger'|'success'`.

## Layout

Dashboard layouts use CSS Grid via Tailwind classes. Standard pattern:

```html
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4" style="grid-auto-rows:400px">
  <div class="lg:col-span-2" id="revenue-chart"></div>
  <div id="region-chart"></div>
</div>
```

- Fix row height with inline `grid-auto-rows:NNNpx` (for "LEGO block" alignment).
- Use `col-span-2` / `lg:col-span-2` to make a widget span 2 columns.
- Small tiles: 120–200px. Regular cards: 400px. Tall cards (treemap etc.): 600px.
- `<body class="mw-themed">` provides base page styling.

## Complete example

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko" data-theme="claude">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/m1kapp/maging@v0.1.5/dist/maging-all.js"></script>
</head>
<body class="mw-themed">
<main class="max-w-[1280px] mx-auto p-6">

  <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4" style="grid-auto-rows:192px" id="kpi-row"></div>

  <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mt-4" style="grid-auto-rows:400px">
    <div class="lg:col-span-2" id="revenue-chart"></div>
    <div id="region-chart"></div>
  </div>

</main>

<script>
// 'maging:ready' fires when Pretendard, maging.css, Tailwind, ECharts, maging.js
// are all loaded and ready. Safer than DOMContentLoaded for one-liner setup.
window.addEventListener('maging:ready', () => {
  const kpis = [
    { label: '매출', value: '₩128억', delta: 8.3, sparkline: [420,445,430,468,490,510,548,580] },
    { label: 'MAU',  value: '42,180', delta: 5.1, sparkline: [38200,39100,40200,40800,41400,41900,42180] },
    { label: '계약', value: '127건',  delta: -2.3, sparkline: [22,28,31,29,34,26,27] },
    { label: '응답', value: '1.4s',   delta: -12.0, deltaGoodWhen: 'negative', sparkline: [1.8,1.7,1.55,1.48,1.42,1.4] },
  ];
  const row = document.getElementById('kpi-row');
  kpis.forEach(k => {
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    row.appendChild(el);
    Maging.kpiCard(el, k);
  });

  Maging.lineChart('#revenue-chart', {
    title: '주간 매출', subtitle: '최근 12주',
    categories: ['W01','W02','W03','W04','W05','W06','W07','W08','W09','W10','W11','W12'],
    series: [{ name: 'Enterprise', data: [420,445,430,468,475,490,510,505,530,548,562,580] }],
    yFormatter: v => v + '억',
    height: 260,
  });

  Maging.barChart('#region-chart', {
    title: '지역별', horizontal: true,
    items: [
      { label: '서울', value: 125 }, { label: '경기', value: 98 },
      { label: '부산', value: 72 },  { label: '인천', value: 54 },
    ],
    yFormatter: v => v + '억',
    height: 260,
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

## LLM generation rules

When generating a dashboard with maging, follow these rules:

1. **Always include setup** (CSS + ECharts + maging + Tailwind, in that order).
2. **Pick a theme** — infer from user intent. "minimal" → `linear` / `vercel`. "warm" → `claude` / `notion`. "corporate" → `linkedin` / `stripe`. "bold" → `netflix` / `adobe`. Default to `claude`.
3. **Use Grid for layout**, never floats. Fix row height for LEGO alignment.
4. **Wait for DOM ready** before calling `Maging.xxx(...)`. Use `DOMContentLoaded` or `defer`.
5. **Single HTML file output**. Self-contained. Do not reference external local files.
6. **Pick widgets that match the data shape**:
   - Time series (revenue over weeks) → `lineChart`
   - Categorical breakdown (sales by region) → `barChart` (horizontal for long labels)
   - Share of total → `donutChart`
   - Funnel / conversion → `funnelChart`
   - Target vs actual → `bulletChart` or `ringProgress`
   - Distribution → `treemapChart` or `heatmapChart`
   - Flow / routing → `sankeyChart`
   - Correlation → `scatterChart`
   - Geographic (Korea) → `mapChart`
   - Retention / cohort → `cohortMatrix`
   - P&L / flow decomposition → `waterfallChart`
   - List of people/teams → `leaderboard`
   - Recent events → `timeline` or `activityTable`
   - System health → `statusGrid` + `gaugeChart`
   - OKR / goal tracking → `goalGrid`
   - Multi-metric trend summary → `sparklineList`
7. **Use `kpiCard({ compact: true, icon: '◉' })` for compact mini-stats** in 6-wide grids.
8. **For KRW values**, use `Maging.fmt.krw(v)` formatter or inline `v => '₩' + (v/1_0000_0000).toFixed(1) + '억'`.
9. **Korean dashboards are welcomed**. Labels, titles, captions in Korean are fine.
10. **Alerts at the top**, filters next, then content sections ordered by decision hierarchy: at-a-glance → real-time → trends → deep-dive → operations.

## Canonical globals

- `window.Maging` — primary API (use this in new code)
- `window.mw` — short alias (`mw.kpiCard(...)`)
- `window.MagicWiget` — legacy alias (backward compat, do not use in new code)
